title: Certificate of Incorporation
preview: CERTIFICATE OF INCORPORATION · The Registrar hereby certifies that NEON AI SYSTEMS PRIVATE LIMITED is incorporated under the District Innovation Companies Act 2026, and entered onto the District Registry as ASC-COMP-2041 on the 12th day of March 2026.

title: Memorandum & Articles of Association
preview: Object clauses include the development, operation, and licensing of artificial intelligence inference, evaluation, and tooling systems. Authorised capital ₹1,00,00,000 divided into equity shares of ₹10 each.

title: Founder Residency Permit · Diya Rajiv
preview: Founder Residency permit issued to Diya Rajiv, holder ID ASC-FR-2026-00127, granting Full District Access for the period 12 Mar 2026 to 12 Mar 2031.

title: Founder Residency Permit · Aarav Menon
preview: Founder Residency permit issued to Aarav Menon, holder ID ASC-FR-2026-00131, granting Full District Access for the period 18 Mar 2026 to 12 Mar 2031.

title: Local Hiring Compliance Report · Q1 2026
preview: Quarterly compliance report. Local hiring ratio 84% against floor 40%. Skills Fund contribution ₹4.80 Lakh. Net new AP employment +8. Status: VERIFIED.

title: Innovation Class A · Tax Incentive Approval
preview: Approval under Notice 014/2026 — 30% capex rebate and 5-year tax holiday on qualifying AI infrastructure expenditure. Annual filing required.

title: Workspace Allocation · Tower B Level 12
preview: Allocation of 2,400 sq ft on Level 12, Tower B, Quantum Valley Hub. Lease term 36 months. Renewable. Includes desk capacity 18 and lab access (GPU).

title: District Operating Agreement
preview: Master operating agreement between Neon AI Systems Pvt Ltd and Amaravati Startup Capital, governing district access, compliance obligations, and benefit eligibility.

title: AP Skills Fund · Disbursement Report Q1
preview: Disbursement of ₹4.80 Lakh under the AP Skills Fund towards local hiring training, university partnerships, and intern stipends across IIIT Sri City, RGUKT Nuzvid, JNTU Kakinada.

title: Global Trade Corridor · Application
preview: Application for Global Trade Corridor status — pre-cleared export channel for AI services to Singapore, UAE, US. Filed 03 Apr 2026. Currently in review at the AP DPIIT Cell.
